trigger: 前期提亲、逼婚及马球场试探阶段，自以为能掌控一切，用冷漠掩饰在意。

appearance_delta.face: 面部表情冷酷讥诮，毫无破绽，眼神充满压迫感
appearance_delta.body: 站姿笔挺，长身玉立，极具文臣的威严
appearance_delta.hair: 束发戴冠，一丝不苟，没有丝毫散乱
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 眼下常有疲惫的乌青，但被强硬的气场掩盖

costume_override.outfit: 考究挺括的文臣常服，大袖衫，材质硬挺，彰显身份与不可侵犯的地位

visual_reference: 1boy, ancient chinese handsome official, jade-like face, cold amber eyes with a mocking gaze, perfectly groomed hair with silver guan (crown), wearing dark blue and black stiff traditional scholar robes, tall, arrogant and oppressive expression, standing upright, masterpiece, highly detailed, 8k resolution
emotional_tone: 高高在上，傲慢冷漠，充满掌控欲
